meta.title: RI PROJECTS — Turnkey commercial fit-out in Tashkent
meta.description: Premium turnkey procurement for commercial properties: hotels, restaurants, business centers, clinics, residential. FF&E, OS&E, logistics, certification.

hero.title: Premium turnkey procurement for commercial properties
hero.subtitle: From hotels and restaurants to clinics and residential — we own the full FF&E and OS&E cycle: design, sourcing, installation, logistics and certification.

services.title: Full-cycle services
services.subtitle: We cover procurement from first floor plan to opening day.

sectors.title: Eight sectors we serve
sectors.subtitle: Each one with its own regulations, specifications and logistics.

process.title: How we work
process.subtitle: Four transparent stages — from brief to handover.
